code: bool check(int mid, int* a, int* b, int* t, int* c, int n, int m, int k, long long s) { int pa=1,pb=1; for(int i=1;i<=mid;i++){if(a[pa]>a[i])pa=i;if(b[pb]>b[i])pb=i;} vector<pair<long long,pair<int,int>>> vec; for(int i=1;i<=m;i++){if(t[i]==1)vec.push_back({(long long)a[pa]*c[i],{i,pa}});else vec.push_back({(long long)b[pb]*c[i],{i,pb}});} sort(vec.begin(),vec.end()); long long sum=0; for(int i=0;i<k;i++)sum+=vec[i].first; return sum<=s; }
notes: binary search over n, check() does O(m log m) sort — total O(m log m * log n)

code: void solve(int n, int m, int q) { int B=sqrt(n); vector<int> b[m+1]; map<int,vector<int>> pos; int cnt[m+1]={},was_arr[m+1]={}; vector<pair<int,int>> vec[m+1]; while(q--){} }
notes: sqrt decomposition with heavy/light sets, each query O(sqrt n)

code: void floyd_warshall(vector<vector<int>>& d, int n) { for(int k=0;k<n;k++) for(int i=0;i<n;i++) for(int j=0;j<n;j++) d[i][j]=min(d[i][j],d[i][k]+d[k][j]); }
notes: three nested loops over n vertices

code: int lcs(string a, string b) { int n=a.size(),m=b.size(); vector<vector<int>> dp(n+1,vector<int>(m+1,0)); for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) for(int j=1;j<=m;j++) dp[i][j]=(a[i-1]==b[j-1])?dp[i-1][j-1]+1:max(dp[i-1][j],dp[i][j-1]); return dp[n][m]; }
notes: DP on two sequences of lengths n and m

code: vector<int> bfs(vector<vector<int>>& adj, int s, int n) { vector<int> dist(n,-1); queue<int> q; q.push(s);dist[s]=0; while(!q.empty()){int v=q.front();q.pop();for(int u:adj[v])if(dist[u]==-1){dist[u]=dist[v]+1;q.push(u);}} return dist; }
notes: BFS visits each vertex and edge once

code: bool is_prime(long long n) { if(n<2)return false; for(long long i=2;i*i<=n;i++) if(n%i==0)return false; return true; }
